phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το περίπτερο των εισιτηρίων λεωφορείων;
phrases.cultural_note: In Crete, bus ticket kiosks are often located near central points but exact positions may not be visible from the square itself. Staff assistance is expected.

likely_response.local: Στην άκρη της πλατείας, κοντά στη στάση.
likely_response.translation_en: At the edge of the square, near the stop.

responses.english: At the edge of the square, near the stop.
responses.french: Στην άκρη της πλατείας, κοντά στη στάση.

phrases.intent_en: Are market vendors here cash only?
phrases.text_local: Οι πωλητές της αγοράς δέχονται μόνο μετρητά εδώ;
phrases.cultural_note: Market vendors in this area are known to operate primarily on a cash-only basis.

phrases.intent_en: Do I put tips in the tray?
phrases.cultural_note: Leaving tips in a designated tray is the standard practice in local cafés rather than handing them directly.

phrases.intent_en: Do cafe table charges vary here?
phrases.text_local: Οι χρεώσεις των τραπεζιών των καφενείων ποικίλουν εδώ;
phrases.cultural_note: Café table charges are known to vary across different establishments, even within the same square.

phrases.text_local: Πού βρίσκονται τα ερείπια της τουρκικής φυλακής;
phrases.cultural_note: The Turkish prison remains are a known landmark in the area but their exact position may not be immediately visible. Staff assistance is recommended.

likely_response.local: Πιο πέρα, προς το παλιό πέτρινο κτίριο.
likely_response.translation_en: A little farther on, toward the old stone building.

responses.english: A little farther on, toward the old stone building.
responses.french: Πιο πέρα, προς το παλιό πέτρινο κτίριο.

phrases.intent_en: Must I order before sitting at cafes?
phrases.text_local: Πρέπει να παραγγείλω πριν καθίσω στα καφενεία;
phrases.cultural_note: Ordering before sitting is a common practice in local cafés to ensure service efficiency.
